briefs.title: Council to vote on: Renewing Burnaby's E-COMM 911 dispatch contract for 2026
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on renewing its contract with E-COMM — the regional 911 emergency dispatch service — for one more year (January to December 2026) at a cost of $7.3 million, a 1% increase over the previous year.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — this affects how Burnaby funds its 911 emergency dispatch services in 2026.

key_dates.label: E-COMM Contract Renewal #5 — proposed term start date
Burnaby E-COMM 911 contract renewal — council vote pending (February 2026)
